        ('model',   RandomForestRegressor(**params, random_state=SEED, n_jobs=-1))
    ])
    scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                             cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                             scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
    rmse = -scores.mean()
    history_optuna_rf.append(rmse)
    return rmse

t0 = time.time()
study_rf = optuna.create_study(direction='minimize',
                               sampler=optuna.samplers.TPESampler(seed=SEED))
study_rf.optimize(objective_optuna_rf, n_trials=50, show_progress_bar=False)
t_bayes_rf = time.time() - t0

best_params_bayes_rf = study_rf.best_params
pipe_bayes_rf = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model',   RandomForestRegressor(**best_params_bayes_rf, random_state=SEED, n_jobs=-1))
])
pipe_bayes_rf.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
y_pred_bayes_rf = pipe_bayes_rf.predict(X_val)
rmse_bayes_rf   = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_bayes_rf))
mae_bayes_rf    = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_bayes_rf)

print(f'Bayesiano RF | Tiempo: {t_bayes_rf:.1f}s | Trials: 50')
print(f'  Mejores params: {best_params_bayes_rf}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_bayes_rf:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_bayes_rf:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
best_so_far_rf = np.minimum.accumulate(history_optuna_rf)
ax.plot(history_optuna_rf, alpha=0.4, color='steelblue', label='RMSE por trial')
ax.plot(best_so_far_rf, color='red', linewidth=2, label='Mejor RMSE acumulado')
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Bayesiana Random Forest', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Trial'); ax.set_ylabel('RMSE (CV)'); ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

Bayesiano RF | Tiempo: 307.7s | Trials: 50
  Mejores params: {'n_estimators': 578, 'max_depth': 23, 'min_samples_split': 2, 'min_samples_leaf': 1, 'max_features': 'log2'}
  RMSE validacion: 441.24  |  MAE: 267.32

La optimización bayesiana en Random Forest logró reducir el RMSE rápidamente durante los primeros trials y después la curva se mantuvo estable. Esto indica que Optuna encontró buenas combinaciones de hiperparámetros sin necesidad de evaluar todas las opciones posibles. Random Forest necesita ajustar principalmente n_estimators y max_depth, y Optuna los localiza sin probar todas las combinaciones posibles.

21.6.4 Algoritmo Genetico (DEAP) — Random Forest#

# Objetivo: optimizar Random Forest con Algoritmos Geneticos (DEAP).
import random
from deap import base, creator, tools, algorithms

random.seed(SEED); np.random.seed(SEED)

for _name in ['FitnessMin', 'Individual']:
    if hasattr(creator, _name): delattr(creator, _name)

creator.create('FitnessMin', base.Fitness, weights=(-1.0,))
creator.create('Individual', list, fitness=creator.FitnessMin)

# Genes: [n_estimators, max_depth, min_samples_split, min_samples_leaf]
GENE_BOUNDS_RF = [(100, 500), (5, 30), (2, 15), (1, 8)]

def decode_rf(ind):
    return {
        'n_estimators':      int(np.clip(ind[0], *GENE_BOUNDS_RF[0])),
        'max_depth':         int(np.clip(ind[1], *GENE_BOUNDS_RF[1])),
        'min_samples_split': int(np.clip(ind[2], *GENE_BOUNDS_RF[2])),
        'min_samples_leaf':  int(np.clip(ind[3], *GENE_BOUNDS_RF[3])),
        'max_features':      'sqrt',
    }

def fitness_ga_rf(individual):
    params = decode_rf(individual)
    pipe = Pipeline([
        ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
        ('model',   RandomForestRegressor(**params, random_state=SEED, n_jobs=-1))
    ])
    try:
        scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                                 cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                                 scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
        return (-scores.mean(),)
    except Exception:
        return (1e9,)

toolbox_rf = base.Toolbox()
def rand_gene_rf(i): lo, hi = GENE_BOUNDS_RF[i]; return random.uniform(lo, hi)
toolbox_rf.register('individual', tools.initCycle, creator.Individual,
                    [lambda i=i: rand_gene_rf(i) for i in range(len(GENE_BOUNDS_RF))], n=1)
toolbox_rf.register('population', tools.initRepeat, list, toolbox_rf.individual)
toolbox_rf.register('evaluate', fitness_ga_rf)
toolbox_rf.register('mate',   tools.cxBlend, alpha=0.4)
toolbox_rf.register('mutate', tools.mutGaussian, mu=0, sigma=0.15, indpb=0.3)
toolbox_rf.register('select', tools.selTournament, tournsize=3)

POP_RF, GEN_RF, CXPB_RF, MUTPB_RF = 20, 15, 0.6, 0.3
history_ga_rf = []

t0 = time.time()
pop_rf = toolbox_rf.population(n=POP_RF)
for ind, fit in zip(pop_rf, map(toolbox_rf.evaluate, pop_rf)):
    ind.fitness.values = fit

for gen in range(GEN_RF):
    offspring = algorithms.varAnd(pop_rf, toolbox_rf, cxpb=CXPB_RF, mutpb=MUTPB_RF)
    fits = list(map(toolbox_rf.evaluate, offspring))
    for ind, fit in zip(offspring, fits): ind.fitness.values = fit
    pop_rf = toolbox_rf.select(offspring + pop_rf, k=POP_RF)
    best_gen_rf = min(ind.fitness.values[0] for ind in pop_rf)
    history_ga_rf.append(best_gen_rf)
    if (gen+1) % 5 == 0:
        print(f'  Gen {gen+1:2d}/{GEN_RF} — Mejor RMSE: {best_gen_rf:.2f}')

t_ga_rf = time.time() - t0
best_ind_rf    = tools.selBest(pop_rf, k=1)[0]
best_params_ga_rf = decode_rf(best_ind_rf)

pipe_ga_rf = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model',   RandomForestRegressor(**best_params_ga_rf, random_state=SEED, n_jobs=-1))
])
pipe_ga_rf.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
y_pred_ga_rf = pipe_ga_rf.predict(X_val)
rmse_ga_rf   = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_ga_rf))
mae_ga_rf    = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_ga_rf)

print(f'Algoritmo Genetico RF | Tiempo: {t_ga_rf:.1f}s | Evaluaciones: {POP_RF*GEN_RF}')
print(f'  Mejores params: {best_params_ga_rf}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_ga_rf:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_ga_rf:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.plot(range(1, len(history_ga_rf)+1), history_ga_rf, 'o-', color='darkorange', linewidth=2)
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Algoritmo Genetico Random Forest', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Generacion'); ax.set_ylabel('Mejor RMSE (CV)')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

  Gen  5/15 — Mejor RMSE: 469.49
  Gen 10/15 — Mejor RMSE: 469.39
  Gen 15/15 — Mejor RMSE: 469.39
Algoritmo Genetico RF | Tiempo: 2658.0s | Evaluaciones: 300
  Mejores params: {'n_estimators': 457, 'max_depth': 24, 'min_samples_split': 3, 'min_samples_leaf': 1, 'max_features': 'sqrt'}
  RMSE validacion: 442.80  |  MAE: 268.98

La gráfica muestra que el Algoritmo Genético en Random Forest mejoró el RMSE en las primeras generaciones y luego la curva se estabilizó rápidamente. Esto indica que el modelo encontró una buena combinación de hiperparámetros en poco tiempo.

21.6.5 Comparacion de Metodos — Random Forest#

# Objetivo: comparar los cuatro metodos de optimizacion para Random Forest.

opt_comparison_rf = pd.DataFrame([
    {'Metodo': 'Grid Search',        'RMSE Val': rmse_gs_rf,    'MAE Val': mae_gs_rf,    'Tiempo (s)': t_grid_rf,   'Evaluaciones': len(gs_rf.cv_results_['params'])*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Random Search',      'RMSE Val': rmse_rs_rf,    'MAE Val': mae_rs_rf,    'Tiempo (s)': t_random_rf, 'Evaluaciones': 40*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Bayesiano (Optuna)', 'RMSE Val': rmse_bayes_rf, 'MAE Val': mae_bayes_rf, 'Tiempo (s)': t_bayes_rf,  'Evaluaciones': 50*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Algoritmo Genetico', 'RMSE Val': rmse_ga_rf,    'MAE Val': mae_ga_rf,    'Tiempo (s)': t_ga_rf,     'Evaluaciones': POP_RF*GEN_RF},
]).sort_values('RMSE Val').reset_index(drop=True)
opt_comparison_rf.index += 1

print('=== Comparacion de Metodos de Optimizacion — Random Forest ===')
print(opt_comparison_rf.to_string())

best_rf_row    = opt_comparison_rf.iloc[0]
best_rf_method = best_rf_row['Metodo']
metodo_map_rf  = {
    'Bayesiano (Optuna)': pipe_bayes_rf,
    'Algoritmo Genetico': pipe_ga_rf,
    'Random Search':      best_rs_rf_pipe,
    'Grid Search':        best_gs_rf_pipe,
}
best_rf_pipe = metodo_map_rf[best_rf_method]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))
colors_opt = ['#2ecc71','#3498db','#f39c12','#e74c3c']
axes[0].barh(opt_comparison_rf['Metodo'], opt_comparison_rf['RMSE Val'], color=colors_opt, alpha=0.85)
axes[0].set_title('RMSE en Validacion — RF', fontweight='bold'); axes[0].set_xlabel('RMSE')
axes[1].barh(opt_comparison_rf['Metodo'], opt_comparison_rf['Tiempo (s)'], color='steelblue', alpha=0.85)
axes[1].set_title('Tiempo de Ejecucion — RF', fontweight='bold'); axes[1].set_xlabel('Segundos')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

=== Comparacion de Metodos de Optimizacion — Random Forest ===
               Metodo    RMSE Val     MAE Val   Tiempo (s)  Evaluaciones
1  Bayesiano (Optuna)  441.236935  267.318068   307.684313           150
2       Random Search  442.668143  252.634222   209.291539           120
3  Algoritmo Genetico  442.804225  268.983767  2657.984824           300
4         Grid Search  443.631769  269.289554    97.610007           108

Los métodos de optimización en Random Forest obtuvieron resultados muy similares en RMSE, aunque la optimización bayesiana logró el menor error. Esto indica que varios métodos pueden encontrar buenas combinaciones de hiperparámetros para este modelo.

En el tiempo de ejecución se observa que el Algoritmo Genético fue mucho más lento que los demás métodos, mientras que Grid Search fue el más rápido. Esto muestra que un mayor tiempo de búsqueda no siempre garantiza mejores resultados.

21.7 Optimizacion de Hiperparametros — KNN#

21.7.1 Grid Search — KNN#

# Objetivo: optimizar KNN con Grid Search.
from sklearn.neighbors import KNeighborsRegressor

pipe_knn_gs = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
    ('model',   KNeighborsRegressor(n_jobs=-1))
])

param_grid_knn = {
    'model__n_neighbors': [3, 5, 10, 15, 20],
    'model__weights':     ['uniform', 'distance'],
    'model__p':           [1, 2],
}
# 5x2x2 = 20 combinaciones x 3 folds = 60 fits

t0 = time.time()
gs_knn = GridSearchCV(pipe_knn_gs, param_grid_knn, cv=cv3,
                      scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1, refit=True)
gs_knn.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
t_grid_knn = time.time() - t0

best_gs_knn_pipe = gs_knn.best_estimator_
y_pred_gs_knn    = best_gs_knn_pipe.predict(X_val)
rmse_gs_knn      = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_gs_knn))
mae_gs_knn       = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_gs_knn)

print(f'Grid Search KNN | Tiempo: {t_grid_knn:.1f}s | Iteraciones: {len(gs_knn.cv_results_["params"])}')
print(f'  Mejores params: {gs_knn.best_params_}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_gs_knn:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_gs_knn:.2f}')

Grid Search KNN | Tiempo: 30.4s | Iteraciones: 20
  Mejores params: {'model__n_neighbors': 10, 'model__p': 1, 'model__weights': 'distance'}
  RMSE validacion: 817.20  |  MAE: 594.00

21.7.2 Random Search — KNN#

# Objetivo: optimizar KNN con Random Search.

param_dist_knn = {
    'model__n_neighbors': randint(3, 30),
    'model__weights':     ['uniform', 'distance'],
    'model__p':           [1, 2],
    'model__leaf_size':   randint(20, 50),
}

pipe_knn_rs = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
    ('model',   KNeighborsRegressor(n_jobs=-1))
])

t0 = time.time()
rs_knn = RandomizedSearchCV(pipe_knn_rs, param_dist_knn, n_iter=40, cv=cv3,
                             scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error',
                             n_jobs=1, random_state=SEED, refit=True)
rs_knn.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
t_random_knn = time.time() - t0

best_rs_knn_pipe = rs_knn.best_estimator_
y_pred_rs_knn    = best_rs_knn_pipe.predict(X_val)
rmse_rs_knn      = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_rs_knn))
mae_rs_knn       = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_rs_knn)

print(f'Random Search KNN | Tiempo: {t_random_knn:.1f}s | Iteraciones: 40')
print(f'  Mejores params: {rs_knn.best_params_}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_rs_knn:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_rs_knn:.2f}')

Random Search KNN | Tiempo: 63.0s | Iteraciones: 40
  Mejores params: {'model__leaf_size': 24, 'model__n_neighbors': 12, 'model__p': 1, 'model__weights': 'distance'}
  RMSE validacion: 813.77  |  MAE: 597.79

21.7.3 Optimizacion Bayesiana (Optuna) — KNN#

# Objetivo: optimizar KNN con Optuna (Bayesiano).

history_optuna_knn = []

def objective_optuna_knn(trial):
    params = {
        'n_neighbors': trial.suggest_int('n_neighbors', 3, 30),
        'weights':     trial.suggest_categorical('weights', ['uniform', 'distance']),
        'p':           trial.suggest_categorical('p', [1, 2]),
        'leaf_size':   trial.suggest_int('leaf_size', 20, 50),
    }
    pipe = Pipeline([
        ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
        ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
        ('model',   KNeighborsRegressor(**params, n_jobs=-1))
    ])
    scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                             cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                             scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
    rmse = -scores.mean()
    history_optuna_knn.append(rmse)
    return rmse

t0 = time.time()
study_knn = optuna.create_study(direction='minimize',
                                sampler=optuna.samplers.TPESampler(seed=SEED))
study_knn.optimize(objective_optuna_knn, n_trials=50, show_progress_bar=False)
t_bayes_knn = time.time() - t0

best_params_bayes_knn = study_knn.best_params
pipe_bayes_knn = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
    ('model',   KNeighborsRegressor(**best_params_bayes_knn, n_jobs=-1))
])
pipe_bayes_knn.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
y_pred_bayes_knn = pipe_bayes_knn.predict(X_val)
rmse_bayes_knn   = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_bayes_knn))
mae_bayes_knn    = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_bayes_knn)

print(f'Bayesiano KNN | Tiempo: {t_bayes_knn:.1f}s | Trials: 50')
print(f'  Mejores params: {best_params_bayes_knn}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_bayes_knn:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_bayes_knn:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
best_so_far_knn = np.minimum.accumulate(history_optuna_knn)
ax.plot(history_optuna_knn, alpha=0.4, color='steelblue', label='RMSE por trial')
ax.plot(best_so_far_knn, color='red', linewidth=2, label='Mejor RMSE acumulado')
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Bayesiana KNN', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Trial'); ax.set_ylabel('RMSE (CV)'); ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

Bayesiano KNN | Tiempo: 96.0s | Trials: 50
  Mejores params: {'n_neighbors': 12, 'weights': 'distance', 'p': 1, 'leaf_size': 26}
  RMSE validacion: 813.77  |  MAE: 597.79

La optimización bayesiana en KNN logró encontrar rápidamente un mejor valor de RMSE en los primeros trials y luego la curva se mantuvo estable. Esto indica que el modelo alcanzó su mejor combinación de hiperparámetros en pocas iteraciones.

21.7.4 Algoritmo Genetico (DEAP) — KNN#

# Objetivo: optimizar KNN con Algoritmos Geneticos (DEAP).

random.seed(SEED); np.random.seed(SEED)

for _name in ['FitnessMin', 'Individual']:
    if hasattr(creator, _name): delattr(creator, _name)
creator.create('FitnessMin', base.Fitness, weights=(-1.0,))
creator.create('Individual', list, fitness=creator.FitnessMin)

# Genes: [n_neighbors, p(1-2), leaf_size]
GENE_BOUNDS_KNN = [(3, 30), (1, 2), (20, 50)]

def decode_knn(ind):
    return {
        'n_neighbors': int(np.clip(round(ind[0]), *GENE_BOUNDS_KNN[0])),
        'weights':     'distance',
        'p':           int(np.clip(round(ind[1]), 1, 2)),
        'leaf_size':   int(np.clip(round(ind[2]), *GENE_BOUNDS_KNN[2])),
    }

def fitness_ga_knn(individual):
    params = decode_knn(individual)
    pipe = Pipeline([
        ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
        ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
        ('model',   KNeighborsRegressor(**params, n_jobs=-1))
    ])
    try:
        scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                                 cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                                 scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
        return (-scores.mean(),)
    except Exception:
        return (1e9,)

toolbox_knn = base.Toolbox()
def rand_gene_knn(i): lo, hi = GENE_BOUNDS_KNN[i]; return random.uniform(lo, hi)
toolbox_knn.register('individual', tools.initCycle, creator.Individual,
                     [lambda i=i: rand_gene_knn(i) for i in range(len(GENE_BOUNDS_KNN))], n=1)
toolbox_knn.register('population', tools.initRepeat, list, toolbox_knn.individual)
toolbox_knn.register('evaluate', fitness_ga_knn)
toolbox_knn.register('mate',   tools.cxBlend, alpha=0.4)
toolbox_knn.register('mutate', tools.mutGaussian, mu=0, sigma=0.1, indpb=0.3)
toolbox_knn.register('select', tools.selTournament, tournsize=3)

POP_KNN, GEN_KNN = 20, 15
history_ga_knn = []

t0 = time.time()
pop_knn = toolbox_knn.population(n=POP_KNN)
for ind, fit in zip(pop_knn, map(toolbox_knn.evaluate, pop_knn)): ind.fitness.values = fit

for gen in range(GEN_KNN):
    offspring = algorithms.varAnd(pop_knn, toolbox_knn, cxpb=0.6, mutpb=0.3)
    fits = list(map(toolbox_knn.evaluate, offspring))
    for ind, fit in zip(offspring, fits): ind.fitness.values = fit
    pop_knn = toolbox_knn.select(offspring + pop_knn, k=POP_KNN)
    best_gen_knn = min(ind.fitness.values[0] for ind in pop_knn)
    history_ga_knn.append(best_gen_knn)
    if (gen+1) % 5 == 0:
        print(f'  Gen {gen+1:2d}/{GEN_KNN} — Mejor RMSE: {best_gen_knn:.2f}')

t_ga_knn = time.time() - t0
best_ind_knn = tools.selBest(pop_knn, k=1)[0]
best_params_ga_knn = decode_knn(best_ind_knn)

pipe_ga_knn = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
    ('model',   KNeighborsRegressor(**best_params_ga_knn, n_jobs=-1))
])
pipe_ga_knn.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
y_pred_ga_knn = pipe_ga_knn.predict(X_val)
rmse_ga_knn   = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_ga_knn))
mae_ga_knn    = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_ga_knn)

print(f'Algoritmo Genetico KNN | Tiempo: {t_ga_knn:.1f}s | Evaluaciones: {POP_KNN*GEN_KNN}')
print(f'  Mejores params: {best_params_ga_knn}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_ga_knn:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_ga_knn:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.plot(range(1, len(history_ga_knn)+1), history_ga_knn, 'o-', color='darkorange', linewidth=2)
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Algoritmo Genetico KNN', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Generacion'); ax.set_ylabel('Mejor RMSE (CV)')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

  Gen  5/15 — Mejor RMSE: 855.84
  Gen 10/15 — Mejor RMSE: 855.84
  Gen 15/15 — Mejor RMSE: 855.84
Algoritmo Genetico KNN | Tiempo: 664.3s | Evaluaciones: 300
  Mejores params: {'n_neighbors': 12, 'weights': 'distance', 'p': 1, 'leaf_size': 37}
  RMSE validacion: 813.77  |  MAE: 597.79

La gráfica muestra que el Algoritmo Genético mejoró el RMSE rápidamente en las primeras generaciones y después se estabilizó. Esto indica que KNN encontró su mejor combinación de hiperparámetros en poco tiempo y ya no logró mejoras importantes. Esto se da ya que no hay mucho espacio para explorar cuando el modelo tiene solo 2 parámetros principales.

21.7.5 Comparacion de Metodos — KNN#

# Objetivo: comparar los cuatro metodos de optimizacion para KNN.

opt_comparison_knn = pd.DataFrame([
    {'Metodo': 'Grid Search',        'RMSE Val': rmse_gs_knn,    'MAE Val': mae_gs_knn,    'Tiempo (s)': t_grid_knn,   'Evaluaciones': len(gs_knn.cv_results_['params'])*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Random Search',      'RMSE Val': rmse_rs_knn,    'MAE Val': mae_rs_knn,    'Tiempo (s)': t_random_knn, 'Evaluaciones': 40*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Bayesiano (Optuna)', 'RMSE Val': rmse_bayes_knn, 'MAE Val': mae_bayes_knn, 'Tiempo (s)': t_bayes_knn,  'Evaluaciones': 50*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Algoritmo Genetico', 'RMSE Val': rmse_ga_knn,    'MAE Val': mae_ga_knn,    'Tiempo (s)': t_ga_knn,     'Evaluaciones': POP_KNN*GEN_KNN},
]).sort_values('RMSE Val').reset_index(drop=True)
opt_comparison_knn.index += 1

print('=== Comparacion de Metodos de Optimizacion — KNN ===')
print(opt_comparison_knn.to_string())

best_knn_row    = opt_comparison_knn.iloc[0]
best_knn_method = best_knn_row['Metodo']
metodo_map_knn  = {
    'Bayesiano (Optuna)': pipe_bayes_knn,
    'Algoritmo Genetico': pipe_ga_knn,
    'Random Search':      best_rs_knn_pipe,
    'Grid Search':        best_gs_knn_pipe,
}
best_knn_pipe = metodo_map_knn[best_knn_method]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))
axes[0].barh(opt_comparison_knn['Metodo'], opt_comparison_knn['RMSE Val'], color=['#2ecc71','#3498db','#f39c12','#e74c3c'], alpha=0.85)
axes[0].set_title('RMSE en Validacion — KNN', fontweight='bold'); axes[0].set_xlabel('RMSE')
axes[1].barh(opt_comparison_knn['Metodo'], opt_comparison_knn['Tiempo (s)'], color='steelblue', alpha=0.85)
axes[1].set_title('Tiempo de Ejecucion — KNN', fontweight='bold'); axes[1].set_xlabel('Segundos')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

=== Comparacion de Metodos de Optimizacion — KNN ===
               Metodo    RMSE Val     MAE Val  Tiempo (s)  Evaluaciones
1       Random Search  813.767376  597.785596   63.038021           120
2  Bayesiano (Optuna)  813.767376  597.785596   96.037503           150
3  Algoritmo Genetico  813.767376  597.785596  664.300686           300
4         Grid Search  817.199333  593.996745   30.402107            60

Los métodos de optimización en KNN obtuvieron valores de RMSE muy parecidos, lo que indica que cambiar la estrategia de búsqueda no generó grandes mejoras en la precisión del modelo

21.8 Optimizacion de Hiperparametros — Arbol de Decision#

21.8.1 Grid Search — Arbol de Decision#

# Objetivo: optimizar Arbol de Decision con Grid Search.
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeRegressor

pipe_dt_gs = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model',   DecisionTreeRegressor(random_state=SEED))
])

param_grid_dt = {
    'model__max_depth':        [5, 10, 15, 20, None],
    'model__min_samples_split':[2, 5, 10],
    'model__min_samples_leaf': [1, 3, 5],
    'model__max_features':     ['sqrt', 'log2', None],
}
# 5x3x3x3 = 135 combinaciones x 3 folds

t0 = time.time()
gs_dt = GridSearchCV(pipe_dt_gs, param_grid_dt, cv=cv3,
                     scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1, refit=True)
gs_dt.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
t_grid_dt = time.time() - t0

best_gs_dt_pipe = gs_dt.best_estimator_
y_pred_gs_dt    = best_gs_dt_pipe.predict(X_val)
rmse_gs_dt      = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_gs_dt))
mae_gs_dt       = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_gs_dt)

print(f'Grid Search DT | Tiempo: {t_grid_dt:.1f}s | Iteraciones: {len(gs_dt.cv_results_["params"])}')
print(f'  Mejores params: {gs_dt.best_params_}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_gs_dt:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_gs_dt:.2f}')

Grid Search DT | Tiempo: 47.2s | Iteraciones: 135
  Mejores params: {'model__max_depth': 10, 'model__max_features': None, 'model__min_samples_leaf': 5, 'model__min_samples_split': 2}
  RMSE validacion: 512.27  |  MAE: 295.34

21.8.2 Random Search — Arbol de Decision#

# Objetivo: optimizar Arbol de Decision con Random Search.

param_dist_dt = {
    'model__max_depth':        randint(3, 30),
    'model__min_samples_split':randint(2, 20),
    'model__min_samples_leaf': randint(1, 10),
    'model__max_features':     ['sqrt', 'log2', None],
}

pipe_dt_rs = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model',   DecisionTreeRegressor(random_state=SEED))
])

t0 = time.time()
rs_dt = RandomizedSearchCV(pipe_dt_rs, param_dist_dt, n_iter=40, cv=cv3,
                            scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error',
                            n_jobs=1, random_state=SEED, refit=True)
rs_dt.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
t_random_dt = time.time() - t0

best_rs_dt_pipe = rs_dt.best_estimator_
y_pred_rs_dt    = best_rs_dt_pipe.predict(X_val)
rmse_rs_dt      = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_rs_dt))
mae_rs_dt       = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_rs_dt)

print(f'Random Search DT | Tiempo: {t_random_dt:.1f}s | Iteraciones: 40')
print(f'  Mejores params: {rs_dt.best_params_}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_rs_dt:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_rs_dt:.2f}')

Random Search DT | Tiempo: 12.2s | Iteraciones: 40
  Mejores params: {'model__max_depth': 9, 'model__max_features': None, 'model__min_samples_leaf': 9, 'model__min_samples_split': 16}
  RMSE validacion: 500.21  |  MAE: 295.62

21.8.3 Optimizacion Bayesiana (Optuna) — Arbol de Decision#

# Objetivo: optimizar Arbol de Decision con Optuna (Bayesiano).

history_optuna_dt = []

def objective_optuna_dt(trial):
    params = {
        'max_depth':         trial.suggest_int('max_depth', 3, 30),
        'min_samples_split': trial.suggest_int('min_samples_split', 2, 20),
        'min_samples_leaf':  trial.suggest_int('min_samples_leaf', 1, 10),
        'max_features':      trial.suggest_categorical('max_features', ['sqrt', 'log2']),
    }
    pipe = Pipeline([
        ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
        ('model',   DecisionTreeRegressor(**params, random_state=SEED))
    ])
    scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                             cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                             scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
    rmse = -scores.mean()
    history_optuna_dt.append(rmse)
    return rmse

t0 = time.time()
study_dt = optuna.create_study(direction='minimize',
                               sampler=optuna.samplers.TPESampler(seed=SEED))
study_dt.optimize(objective_optuna_dt, n_trials=50, show_progress_bar=False)
t_bayes_dt = time.time() - t0

best_params_bayes_dt = study_dt.best_params
pipe_bayes_dt = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model',   DecisionTreeRegressor(**best_params_bayes_dt, random_state=SEED))
])
pipe_bayes_dt.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
y_pred_bayes_dt = pipe_bayes_dt.predict(X_val)
rmse_bayes_dt   = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_bayes_dt))
mae_bayes_dt    = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_bayes_dt)

print(f'Bayesiano DT | Tiempo: {t_bayes_dt:.1f}s | Trials: 50')
print(f'  Mejores params: {best_params_bayes_dt}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_bayes_dt:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_bayes_dt:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 4))
best_so_far_dt = np.minimum.accumulate(history_optuna_dt)
ax.plot(history_optuna_dt, alpha=0.4, color='steelblue', label='RMSE por trial')
ax.plot(best_so_far_dt, color='red', linewidth=2, label='Mejor RMSE acumulado')
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Bayesiana Arbol de Decision', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Trial'); ax.set_ylabel('RMSE (CV)'); ax.legend()
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

Bayesiano DT | Tiempo: 11.5s | Trials: 50
  Mejores params: {'max_depth': 20, 'min_samples_split': 20, 'min_samples_leaf': 4, 'max_features': 'log2'}
  RMSE validacion: 680.55  |  MAE: 411.67

La optimización bayesiana logró reducir el RMSE a medida que avanzaron los trials, mostrando que el modelo fue aprendiendo y encontrando mejores combinaciones de hiperparámetros. Sin embargo, después de varios intentos la mejora se estabilizó cerca de 650, lo que indica que el Árbol de Decisión alcanzó un límite en su capacidad predictiva.

21.8.4 Algoritmo Genetico (DEAP) — Arbol de Decision#

# Objetivo: optimizar Arbol de Decision con Algoritmos Geneticos (DEAP).

random.seed(SEED); np.random.seed(SEED)

for _name in ['FitnessMin', 'Individual']:
    if hasattr(creator, _name): delattr(creator, _name)
creator.create('FitnessMin', base.Fitness, weights=(-1.0,))
creator.create('Individual', list, fitness=creator.FitnessMin)

# Genes: [max_depth, min_samples_split, min_samples_leaf]
GENE_BOUNDS_DT = [(3, 30), (2, 20), (1, 10)]

def decode_dt(ind):
    return {
        'max_depth':         int(np.clip(round(ind[0]), *GENE_BOUNDS_DT[0])),
        'min_samples_split': int(np.clip(round(ind[1]), *GENE_BOUNDS_DT[1])),
        'min_samples_leaf':  int(np.clip(round(ind[2]), *GENE_BOUNDS_DT[2])),
        'max_features':      'sqrt',
    }

def fitness_ga_dt(individual):
    params = decode_dt(individual)
    pipe = Pipeline([
        ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
        ('model',   DecisionTreeRegressor(**params, random_state=SEED))
    ])
    try:
        scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                                 cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                                 scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
        return (-scores.mean(),)
    except Exception:
        return (1e9,)

toolbox_dt = base.Toolbox()
def rand_gene_dt(i): lo, hi = GENE_BOUNDS_DT[i]; return random.uniform(lo, hi)
toolbox_dt.register('individual', tools.initCycle, creator.Individual,
                    [lambda i=i: rand_gene_dt(i) for i in range(len(GENE_BOUNDS_DT))], n=1)
toolbox_dt.register('population', tools.initRepeat, list, toolbox_dt.individual)
toolbox_dt.register('evaluate', fitness_ga_dt)
toolbox_dt.register('mate',   tools.cxBlend, alpha=0.4)
toolbox_dt.register('mutate', tools.mutGaussian, mu=0, sigma=0.2, indpb=0.3)
toolbox_dt.register('select', tools.selTournament, tournsize=3)

POP_DT, GEN_DT = 20, 15
history_ga_dt = []

t0 = time.time()
pop_dt = toolbox_dt.population(n=POP_DT)
for ind, fit in zip(pop_dt, map(toolbox_dt.evaluate, pop_dt)): ind.fitness.values = fit

for gen in range(GEN_DT):
    offspring = algorithms.varAnd(pop_dt, toolbox_dt, cxpb=0.6, mutpb=0.3)
    fits = list(map(toolbox_dt.evaluate, offspring))
    for ind, fit in zip(offspring, fits): ind.fitness.values = fit
    pop_dt = toolbox_dt.select(offspring + pop_dt, k=POP_DT)
    best_gen_dt = min(ind.fitness.values[0] for ind in pop_dt)
    history_ga_dt.append(best_gen_dt)
    if (gen+1) % 5 == 0:
        print(f'  Gen {gen+1:2d}/{GEN_DT} — Mejor RMSE: {best_gen_dt:.2f}')

t_ga_dt = time.time() - t0
best_params_ga_dt = decode_dt(tools.selBest(pop_dt, k=1)[0])

pipe_ga_dt = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model',   DecisionTreeRegressor(**best_params_ga_dt, random_state=SEED))
])
pipe_ga_dt.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
y_pred_ga_dt = pipe_ga_dt.predict(X_val)
rmse_ga_dt   = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, y_pred_ga_dt))
mae_ga_dt    = mean_absolute_error(y_val, y_pred_ga_dt)

print(f'Algoritmo Genetico DT | Tiempo: {t_ga_dt:.1f}s | Evaluaciones: {POP_DT*GEN_DT}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_ga_dt:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_ga_dt:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.plot(range(1, len(history_ga_dt)+1), history_ga_dt, 'o-', color='darkorange', linewidth=2)
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Algoritmo Genetico Arbol de Decision', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Generacion'); ax.set_ylabel('Mejor RMSE (CV)')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

  Gen  5/15 — Mejor RMSE: 652.44
  Gen 10/15 — Mejor RMSE: 652.44
  Gen 15/15 — Mejor RMSE: 652.44
Algoritmo Genetico DT | Tiempo: 57.2s | Evaluaciones: 300
  RMSE validacion: 680.41  |  MAE: 403.84

La gráfica muestra que el Algoritmo Genético mantuvo el mismo valor de RMSE en todas las generaciones. Esto indica que el modelo no logró mejorar durante el proceso de optimización y se quedó estancado desde el inicio.

21.8.5 Comparacion de Metodos — Arbol de Decision#

# Objetivo: comparar los cuatro metodos de optimizacion para Arbol de Decision.

opt_comparison_dt = pd.DataFrame([
    {'Metodo': 'Grid Search',        'RMSE Val': rmse_gs_dt,    'MAE Val': mae_gs_dt,    'Tiempo (s)': t_grid_dt,   'Evaluaciones': len(gs_dt.cv_results_['params'])*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Random Search',      'RMSE Val': rmse_rs_dt,    'MAE Val': mae_rs_dt,    'Tiempo (s)': t_random_dt, 'Evaluaciones': 40*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Bayesiano (Optuna)', 'RMSE Val': rmse_bayes_dt, 'MAE Val': mae_bayes_dt, 'Tiempo (s)': t_bayes_dt,  'Evaluaciones': 50*3},
    {'Metodo': 'Algoritmo Genetico', 'RMSE Val': rmse_ga_dt,    'MAE Val': mae_ga_dt,    'Tiempo (s)': t_ga_dt,     'Evaluaciones': POP_DT*GEN_DT},
]).sort_values('RMSE Val').reset_index(drop=True)
opt_comparison_dt.index += 1

print('=== Comparacion de Metodos de Optimizacion — Arbol de Decision ===')
print(opt_comparison_dt.to_string())

best_dt_row    = opt_comparison_dt.iloc[0]
best_dt_method = best_dt_row['Metodo']
metodo_map_dt  = {
    'Bayesiano (Optuna)': pipe_bayes_dt,
    'Algoritmo Genetico': pipe_ga_dt,
    'Random Search':      best_rs_dt_pipe,
    'Grid Search':        best_gs_dt_pipe,
}
best_dt_pipe = metodo_map_dt[best_dt_method]

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(14, 5))
axes[0].barh(opt_comparison_dt['Metodo'], opt_comparison_dt['RMSE Val'], color=['#2ecc71','#3498db','#f39c12','#e74c3c'], alpha=0.85)
axes[0].set_title('RMSE en Validacion — DT', fontweight='bold'); axes[0].set_xlabel('RMSE')
axes[1].barh(opt_comparison_dt['Metodo'], opt_comparison_dt['Tiempo (s)'], color='steelblue', alpha=0.85)
axes[1].set_title('Tiempo de Ejecucion — DT', fontweight='bold'); axes[1].set_xlabel('Segundos')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

=== Comparacion de Metodos de Optimizacion — Arbol de Decision ===
               Metodo    RMSE Val     MAE Val  Tiempo (s)  Evaluaciones
1       Random Search  500.212855  295.615761   12.238076           120
2         Grid Search  512.272373  295.337459   47.186254           405
3  Algoritmo Genetico  680.406700  403.842212   57.172771           300
4  Bayesiano (Optuna)  680.551166  411.672091   11.461793           150

Random Search y Grid Search obtuvieron los mejores resultados porque tuvieron los RMSE más bajos. Además Random Search fue mucho más rápido que Grid Search, por lo que logró un mejor equilibrio entre precisión y tiempo de ejecución. Mientras, el método Bayesiano con Optuna y el Algoritmo Genético tardaron más o dieron errores más altos, así que no fueron tan eficientes para este modelo DT.

21.9 Optimizacion de Hiperparametros — SVR#

Para SVR se usan cuatro metodos (Grid Search, Random Search, Bayesiana). Se trabaja con una submuestra de 5 000 registros durante la optimizacion para reducir el tiempo de computo; el modelo final se entrena con el conjunto completo.

# Objetivo: optimizar SVR con Grid Search, Random Search y Bayesiana.
from sklearn.svm import SVR
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# Submuestra para acelerar la optimizacion
SVR_SAMPLE = 5000
rng = np.random.RandomState(SEED)
idx_svr = rng.choice(len(X_train_opt), size=min(SVR_SAMPLE, len(X_train_opt)), replace=False)
X_svr_sub, y_svr_sub = X_train_opt.iloc[idx_svr], y_train_opt.iloc[idx_svr]

cv3_svr = KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED)

def make_svr_pipe(C=1.0, epsilon=0.1, gamma='scale'):
    return Pipeline([
        ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
        ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
        ('model',   SVR(kernel='rbf', C=C, epsilon=epsilon, gamma=gamma))
    ])

# --- Grid Search ---
param_grid_svr = {
    'model__C':       [0.5, 1, 10, 50],
    'model__epsilon': [0.05, 0.1, 0.5],
    'model__gamma':   ['scale', 'auto'],
}
t0 = time.time()
gs_svr = GridSearchCV(make_svr_pipe(), param_grid_svr, cv=cv3_svr,
                      scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1, refit=True)
gs_svr.fit(X_svr_sub, y_svr_sub)
t_grid_svr = time.time() - t0
pipe_gs_svr = make_svr_pipe(**{k.replace('model__', ''): v for k, v in gs_svr.best_params_.items()})
pipe_gs_svr.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
rmse_gs_svr = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_gs_svr.predict(X_val)))
mae_gs_svr  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_gs_svr.predict(X_val))
print(f'Grid Search SVR | Tiempo: {t_grid_svr:.1f}s | Mejores: {gs_svr.best_params_}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_gs_svr:.2f}  MAE: {mae_gs_svr:.2f}')

# --- Random Search ---
from scipy.stats import uniform as sp_uniform
param_dist_svr = {
    'model__C':       sp_uniform(0.1, 100),
    'model__epsilon': sp_uniform(0.01, 1.0),
    'model__gamma':   ['scale', 'auto'],
}
t0 = time.time()
rs_svr = RandomizedSearchCV(make_svr_pipe(), param_dist_svr, n_iter=20, cv=cv3_svr,
                             scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error',
                             n_jobs=1, random_state=SEED, refit=True)
rs_svr.fit(X_svr_sub, y_svr_sub)
t_random_svr = time.time() - t0
pipe_rs_svr = make_svr_pipe(**{k.replace('model__', ''): v for k, v in rs_svr.best_params_.items()})
pipe_rs_svr.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
rmse_rs_svr = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_rs_svr.predict(X_val)))
mae_rs_svr  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_rs_svr.predict(X_val))
print(f'Random Search SVR | Tiempo: {t_random_svr:.1f}s | Mejores: {rs_svr.best_params_}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_rs_svr:.2f}  MAE: {mae_rs_svr:.2f}')

# --- Bayesiana (Optuna) ---
history_optuna_svr = []

def objective_optuna_svr(trial):
    C       = trial.suggest_float('C', 0.1, 100, log=True)
    epsilon = trial.suggest_float('epsilon', 0.01, 1.0, log=True)
    gamma   = trial.suggest_categorical('gamma', ['scale', 'auto'])
    pipe = make_svr_pipe(C=C, epsilon=epsilon, gamma=gamma)
    scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_svr_sub, y_svr_sub,
                             cv=cv3_svr, scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
    rmse = -scores.mean()
    history_optuna_svr.append(rmse)
    return rmse

t0 = time.time()
study_svr = optuna.create_study(direction='minimize',
                                sampler=optuna.samplers.TPESampler(seed=SEED))
study_svr.optimize(objective_optuna_svr, n_trials=30, show_progress_bar=False)
t_bayes_svr = time.time() - t0

bp = study_svr.best_params
pipe_bayes_svr = make_svr_pipe(C=bp['C'], epsilon=bp['epsilon'], gamma=bp['gamma'])
pipe_bayes_svr.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
rmse_bayes_svr = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_bayes_svr.predict(X_val)))
mae_bayes_svr  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_bayes_svr.predict(X_val))
print(f'Bayesiano SVR | Tiempo: {t_bayes_svr:.1f}s | Trials: 30 | Mejores: {bp}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_bayes_svr:.2f}  MAE: {mae_bayes_svr:.2f}')

# Comparacion

Grid Search SVR | Tiempo: 44.1s | Mejores: {'model__C': 50, 'model__epsilon': 0.05, 'model__gamma': 'scale'}
  RMSE: 952.06  MAE: 647.79
Random Search SVR | Tiempo: 37.0s | Mejores: {'model__C': np.float64(98.42308858067881), 'model__epsilon': np.float64(0.47676289324797994), 'model__gamma': 'scale'}
  RMSE: 885.87  MAE: 600.17
Bayesiano SVR | Tiempo: 54.0s | Trials: 30 | Mejores: {'C': 99.35841130951789, 'epsilon': 0.14905123300362877, 'gamma': 'auto'}
  RMSE: 885.08  MAE: 599.53

# Objetivo: optimizar SVR con Algoritmos Geneticos (DEAP). Usa submuestra de 5000 registros.
import random
from deap import base, creator, tools, algorithms
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

random.seed(SEED); np.random.seed(SEED)

for _name in ['FitnessMin', 'Individual']:
    if hasattr(creator, _name): delattr(creator, _name)
creator.create('FitnessMin', base.Fitness, weights=(-1.0,))
creator.create('Individual', list, fitness=creator.FitnessMin)

# Genes: [log(C), log(epsilon)] — espacio logaritmico para mejor exploracion
import math
GENE_BOUNDS_SVR = [(math.log(0.1), math.log(100)),
                   (math.log(0.01), math.log(1.0))]

def decode_svr_ga(ind):
    return {
        'C':       float(np.clip(math.exp(ind[0]), 0.1, 100)),
        'epsilon': float(np.clip(math.exp(ind[1]), 0.01, 1.0)),
        'gamma':   'scale',
    }

def fitness_ga_svr(individual):
    params = decode_svr_ga(individual)
    pipe = make_svr_pipe(**params)
    try:
        scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_svr_sub, y_svr_sub,
                                 cv=cv3_svr,
                                 scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
        return (-scores.mean(),)
    except Exception:
        return (1e9,)

toolbox_svr = base.Toolbox()
def rand_gene_svr(i): lo, hi = GENE_BOUNDS_SVR[i]; return random.uniform(lo, hi)
toolbox_svr.register('individual', tools.initCycle, creator.Individual,
                     [lambda i=i: rand_gene_svr(i) for i in range(len(GENE_BOUNDS_SVR))], n=1)
toolbox_svr.register('population', tools.initRepeat, list, toolbox_svr.individual)
toolbox_svr.register('evaluate', fitness_ga_svr)
toolbox_svr.register('mate',   tools.cxBlend, alpha=0.4)
toolbox_svr.register('mutate', tools.mutGaussian, mu=0, sigma=0.3, indpb=0.5)
toolbox_svr.register('select', tools.selTournament, tournsize=3)

POP_SVR, GEN_SVR = 15, 10
history_ga_svr = []

t0 = time.time()
pop_svr = toolbox_svr.population(n=POP_SVR)
for ind, fit in zip(pop_svr, map(toolbox_svr.evaluate, pop_svr)): ind.fitness.values = fit

for gen in range(GEN_SVR):
    offspring = algorithms.varAnd(pop_svr, toolbox_svr, cxpb=0.6, mutpb=0.4)
    fits = list(map(toolbox_svr.evaluate, offspring))
    for ind, fit in zip(offspring, fits): ind.fitness.values = fit
    pop_svr = toolbox_svr.select(offspring + pop_svr, k=POP_SVR)
    best_gen_svr_ga = min(ind.fitness.values[0] for ind in pop_svr)
    history_ga_svr.append(best_gen_svr_ga)
    if (gen+1) % 5 == 0:
        print(f'  Gen {gen+1:2d}/{GEN_SVR} — Mejor RMSE (sub): {best_gen_svr_ga:.2f}')

t_ga_svr = time.time() - t0
best_params_ga_svr = decode_svr_ga(tools.selBest(pop_svr, k=1)[0])

# Entrenar con datos completos
pipe_ga_svr = make_svr_pipe(**best_params_ga_svr)
pipe_ga_svr.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
rmse_ga_svr = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_ga_svr.predict(X_val)))
mae_ga_svr  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_ga_svr.predict(X_val))

print(f'Algoritmo Genetico SVR | Tiempo: {t_ga_svr:.1f}s | Evaluaciones: {POP_SVR*GEN_SVR}')
print(f'  Mejores params: {best_params_ga_svr}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_ga_svr:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_ga_svr:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.plot(range(1, len(history_ga_svr)+1), history_ga_svr, 'o-', color='darkorange', linewidth=2)
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Algoritmo Genetico SVR (submuestra)', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Generacion'); ax.set_ylabel('Mejor RMSE (CV, submuestra)')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

  Gen  5/10 — Mejor RMSE (sub): 1124.03
  Gen 10/10 — Mejor RMSE (sub): 1124.03
Algoritmo Genetico SVR | Tiempo: 298.1s | Evaluaciones: 150
  Mejores params: {'C': 100.0, 'epsilon': 0.01064041154548669, 'gamma': 'scale'}
  RMSE validacion: 884.52  |  MAE: 599.09

SVR usa una submuestra de 5000 registros para el algoritmo genético porque entrenar con todo el dataset sería extremadamente lento. La curva muestra cómo la penalización C y el margen epsilon evolucionan hacia los valores que mejor ajustan el hiperplano de regresión.

# Objetivo: comparar los cuatro metodos de optimizacion para SVR.

opt_comparison_svr = pd.DataFrame([
    {'Metodo': 'Grid Search',        'RMSE Val': rmse_gs_svr,    'MAE Val': mae_gs_svr,    'Tiempo (s)': t_grid_svr},
    {'Metodo': 'Random Search',      'RMSE Val': rmse_rs_svr,    'MAE Val': mae_rs_svr,    'Tiempo (s)': t_random_svr},
    {'Metodo': 'Bayesiano (Optuna)', 'RMSE Val': rmse_bayes_svr, 'MAE Val': mae_bayes_svr, 'Tiempo (s)': t_bayes_svr},
    {'Metodo': 'Algoritmo Genetico', 'RMSE Val': rmse_ga_svr,    'MAE Val': mae_ga_svr,    'Tiempo (s)': t_ga_svr},
]).sort_values('RMSE Val').reset_index(drop=True)
opt_comparison_svr.index += 1
print('=== Comparacion de Metodos — SVR ==='); print(opt_comparison_svr.to_string())

best_svr_method = opt_comparison_svr.iloc[0]['Metodo']
metodo_map_svr  = {
    'Grid Search':        pipe_gs_svr,
    'Random Search':      pipe_rs_svr,
    'Bayesiano (Optuna)': pipe_bayes_svr,
    'Algoritmo Genetico': pipe_ga_svr,
}
best_svr_pipe = metodo_map_svr[best_svr_method]
best_svr_rmse = opt_comparison_svr.iloc[0]['RMSE Val']
best_svr_mae  = opt_comparison_svr.iloc[0]['MAE Val']

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.barh(opt_comparison_svr['Metodo'], opt_comparison_svr['RMSE Val'],
        color=['#2ecc71','#3498db','#f39c12','#e74c3c'], alpha=0.85)
ax.set_title('RMSE en Validacion — SVR', fontweight='bold'); ax.set_xlabel('RMSE')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

=== Comparacion de Metodos — SVR ===
               Metodo    RMSE Val     MAE Val  Tiempo (s)
1  Algoritmo Genetico  884.523061  599.091219  298.124987
2  Bayesiano (Optuna)  885.076034  599.534454   54.031718
3       Random Search  885.874920  600.172787   36.955152
4         Grid Search  952.060446  647.790683   44.139563

El algoritmo genetico encontró los mejores hiperparámetros C y epsilon para minimizar el RMSE de SVR. SVR es sensible a estos parámetros ya que un C muy alto hace que el modelo memorice demasiado, y uno muy bajo lo vuelve demasiado rígido.

21.10 Optimizacion de Hiperparametros — Ridge#

# Objetivo: optimizar Ridge con Grid Search, Random Search y Bayesiana.
from sklearn.linear_model import Ridge
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

def make_ridge_pipe(alpha=1.0):
    return Pipeline([
        ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
        ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
        ('model',   Ridge(alpha=alpha))
    ])

# --- Grid Search ---
alphas_grid = [0.001, 0.01, 0.1, 1, 10, 50, 100, 500, 1000]
param_grid_ridge = {'model__alpha': alphas_grid}
t0 = time.time()
gs_ridge = GridSearchCV(make_ridge_pipe(), param_grid_ridge, cv=cv3,
                        scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1, refit=True)
gs_ridge.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
t_grid_ridge = time.time() - t0
pipe_gs_ridge = gs_ridge.best_estimator_
rmse_gs_ridge = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_gs_ridge.predict(X_val)))
mae_gs_ridge  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_gs_ridge.predict(X_val))
print(f'Grid Search Ridge | Tiempo: {t_grid_ridge:.1f}s | alpha: {gs_ridge.best_params_["model__alpha"]}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_gs_ridge:.2f}  MAE: {mae_gs_ridge:.2f}')

# --- Random Search ---
from scipy.stats import loguniform
param_dist_ridge = {'model__alpha': loguniform(0.001, 1000)}
t0 = time.time()
rs_ridge = RandomizedSearchCV(make_ridge_pipe(), param_dist_ridge, n_iter=40, cv=cv3,
                               scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error',
                               n_jobs=1, random_state=SEED, refit=True)
rs_ridge.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
t_random_ridge = time.time() - t0
pipe_rs_ridge  = rs_ridge.best_estimator_
rmse_rs_ridge  = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_rs_ridge.predict(X_val)))
mae_rs_ridge   = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_rs_ridge.predict(X_val))
print(f'Random Search Ridge | Tiempo: {t_random_ridge:.1f}s | alpha: {rs_ridge.best_params_["model__alpha"]:.4f}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_rs_ridge:.2f}  MAE: {mae_rs_ridge:.2f}')

# --- Bayesiana ---
history_optuna_ridge = []

def objective_optuna_ridge(trial):
    alpha = trial.suggest_float('alpha', 0.001, 1000, log=True)
    pipe  = make_ridge_pipe(alpha=alpha)
    scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                             cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                             scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
    rmse = -scores.mean()
    history_optuna_ridge.append(rmse)
    return rmse

t0 = time.time()
study_ridge = optuna.create_study(direction='minimize',
                                  sampler=optuna.samplers.TPESampler(seed=SEED))
study_ridge.optimize(objective_optuna_ridge, n_trials=40, show_progress_bar=False)
t_bayes_ridge = time.time() - t0
pipe_bayes_ridge = make_ridge_pipe(alpha=study_ridge.best_params['alpha'])
pipe_bayes_ridge.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
rmse_bayes_ridge = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_bayes_ridge.predict(X_val)))
mae_bayes_ridge  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_bayes_ridge.predict(X_val))
print(f'Bayesiano Ridge | Tiempo: {t_bayes_ridge:.1f}s | alpha: {study_ridge.best_params["alpha"]:.4f}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_bayes_ridge:.2f}  MAE: {mae_bayes_ridge:.2f}')

Grid Search Ridge | Tiempo: 1.2s | alpha: 1000
  RMSE: 1130.50  MAE: 878.02
Random Search Ridge | Tiempo: 5.1s | alpha: 659.8711
  RMSE: 1129.45  MAE: 877.09
Bayesiano Ridge | Tiempo: 5.1s | alpha: 989.1364
  RMSE: 1130.46  MAE: 877.99

# Objetivo: optimizar Ridge con Algoritmos Geneticos (DEAP).
import random, math
from deap import base, creator, tools, algorithms
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

random.seed(SEED); np.random.seed(SEED)

for _name in ['FitnessMin', 'Individual']:
    if hasattr(creator, _name): delattr(creator, _name)
creator.create('FitnessMin', base.Fitness, weights=(-1.0,))
creator.create('Individual', list, fitness=creator.FitnessMin)

# Gen: log(alpha) — busqueda en escala logaritmica
LOG_ALPHA_BOUNDS_RIDGE = (math.log(0.001), math.log(1000))

def decode_ridge_ga(ind):
    return float(np.clip(math.exp(ind[0]),
                         math.exp(LOG_ALPHA_BOUNDS_RIDGE[0]),
                         math.exp(LOG_ALPHA_BOUNDS_RIDGE[1])))

def fitness_ga_ridge(individual):
    alpha = decode_ridge_ga(individual)
    pipe  = make_ridge_pipe(alpha=alpha)
    try:
        scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                                 cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                                 scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
        return (-scores.mean(),)
    except Exception:
        return (1e9,)

toolbox_ridge = base.Toolbox()
lo_r, hi_r = LOG_ALPHA_BOUNDS_RIDGE
toolbox_ridge.register('individual', tools.initCycle, creator.Individual,
                       [lambda: random.uniform(lo_r, hi_r)], n=1)
toolbox_ridge.register('population', tools.initRepeat, list, toolbox_ridge.individual)
toolbox_ridge.register('evaluate', fitness_ga_ridge)
toolbox_ridge.register('mate',   tools.cxBlend, alpha=0.4)
toolbox_ridge.register('mutate', tools.mutGaussian, mu=0, sigma=0.5, indpb=1.0)
toolbox_ridge.register('select', tools.selTournament, tournsize=3)

POP_RIDGE, GEN_RIDGE = 20, 15
history_ga_ridge = []

t0 = time.time()
pop_ridge = toolbox_ridge.population(n=POP_RIDGE)
for ind, fit in zip(pop_ridge, map(toolbox_ridge.evaluate, pop_ridge)): ind.fitness.values = fit

for gen in range(GEN_RIDGE):
    offspring = algorithms.varAnd(pop_ridge, toolbox_ridge, cxpb=0.6, mutpb=0.4)
    fits = list(map(toolbox_ridge.evaluate, offspring))
    for ind, fit in zip(offspring, fits): ind.fitness.values = fit
    pop_ridge = toolbox_ridge.select(offspring + pop_ridge, k=POP_RIDGE)
    best_gen_ridge_ga = min(ind.fitness.values[0] for ind in pop_ridge)
    history_ga_ridge.append(best_gen_ridge_ga)
    if (gen+1) % 5 == 0:
        best_alpha_show = decode_ridge_ga(tools.selBest(pop_ridge, k=1)[0])
        print(f'  Gen {gen+1:2d}/{GEN_RIDGE} — Mejor RMSE: {best_gen_ridge_ga:.2f} | alpha: {best_alpha_show:.4f}')

t_ga_ridge = time.time() - t0
best_alpha_ga_ridge = decode_ridge_ga(tools.selBest(pop_ridge, k=1)[0])

pipe_ga_ridge = make_ridge_pipe(alpha=best_alpha_ga_ridge)
pipe_ga_ridge.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
rmse_ga_ridge = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_ga_ridge.predict(X_val)))
mae_ga_ridge  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_ga_ridge.predict(X_val))

print(f'Algoritmo Genetico Ridge | Tiempo: {t_ga_ridge:.1f}s | Evaluaciones: {POP_RIDGE*GEN_RIDGE}')
print(f'  Mejor alpha: {best_alpha_ga_ridge:.4f}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_ga_ridge:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_ga_ridge:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.plot(range(1, len(history_ga_ridge)+1), history_ga_ridge, 'o-', color='darkorange', linewidth=2)
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Algoritmo Genetico Ridge', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Generacion'); ax.set_ylabel('Mejor RMSE (CV)')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

  Gen  5/15 — Mejor RMSE: 2218.98 | alpha: 1000.0000
  Gen 10/15 — Mejor RMSE: 2218.98 | alpha: 1000.0000
  Gen 15/15 — Mejor RMSE: 2218.98 | alpha: 1000.0000
Algoritmo Genetico Ridge | Tiempo: 38.5s | Evaluaciones: 300
  Mejor alpha: 1000.0000
  RMSE validacion: 1130.50  |  MAE: 878.02

Ridge tiene un único hiperparámetro crítico: alpha, que controla la fuerza de la regularización L2. El algoritmo genético converge muy rápido porque explorar una sola dimensión es trivial ya que pocas generaciones son suficientes. La curva desciende de forma suave porque pequeñas variaciones de alpha producen cambios graduales en el RMSE sin saltos importantes.

# Objetivo: comparar los cuatro metodos de optimizacion para Ridge.

opt_comparison_ridge = pd.DataFrame([
    {'Metodo': 'Grid Search',        'RMSE Val': rmse_gs_ridge,    'MAE Val': mae_gs_ridge,    'Tiempo (s)': t_grid_ridge},
    {'Metodo': 'Random Search',      'RMSE Val': rmse_rs_ridge,    'MAE Val': mae_rs_ridge,    'Tiempo (s)': t_random_ridge},
    {'Metodo': 'Bayesiano (Optuna)', 'RMSE Val': rmse_bayes_ridge, 'MAE Val': mae_bayes_ridge, 'Tiempo (s)': t_bayes_ridge},
    {'Metodo': 'Algoritmo Genetico', 'RMSE Val': rmse_ga_ridge,    'MAE Val': mae_ga_ridge,    'Tiempo (s)': t_ga_ridge},
]).sort_values('RMSE Val').reset_index(drop=True)
opt_comparison_ridge.index += 1
print('=== Comparacion de Metodos — Ridge ==='); print(opt_comparison_ridge.to_string())

best_ridge_method = opt_comparison_ridge.iloc[0]['Metodo']
metodo_map_ridge  = {
    'Grid Search':        pipe_gs_ridge,
    'Random Search':      pipe_rs_ridge,
    'Bayesiano (Optuna)': pipe_bayes_ridge,
    'Algoritmo Genetico': pipe_ga_ridge,
}
best_ridge_pipe = metodo_map_ridge[best_ridge_method]
best_ridge_rmse = opt_comparison_ridge.iloc[0]['RMSE Val']
best_ridge_mae  = opt_comparison_ridge.iloc[0]['MAE Val']

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.barh(opt_comparison_ridge['Metodo'], opt_comparison_ridge['RMSE Val'],
        color=['#2ecc71','#3498db','#f39c12','#e74c3c'], alpha=0.85)
ax.set_title('RMSE en Validacion — Ridge', fontweight='bold'); ax.set_xlabel('RMSE')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

=== Comparacion de Metodos — Ridge ===
               Metodo     RMSE Val     MAE Val  Tiempo (s)
1       Random Search  1129.445777  877.092333    5.095033
2  Bayesiano (Optuna)  1130.462778  877.987977    5.093552
3         Grid Search  1130.501145  878.022953    1.244060
4  Algoritmo Genetico  1130.501145  878.022953   38.476594

Con un solo hiperparámetro , todos los métodos llegan prácticamente al mismo RMSE para Ridge , la diferencia real está en el tiempo de ejecución. Grid Search explora alphas predefinidos, mientras Bayesiana y Random Search buscan en el espacio continuo y pueden encontrar valores más finos. Ridge es el modelo más simple del proyecto ya que su RMSE refleja los límites de un modelo lineal frente a relaciones no lineales en el tráfico.

21.11 Optimizacion de Hiperparametros — Lasso#

# Objetivo: optimizar Lasso con Grid Search, Random Search y Bayesiana.
from sklearn.linear_model import Lasso
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

def make_lasso_pipe(alpha=1.0):
    return Pipeline([
        ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
        ('scaler',  StandardScaler()),
        ('model',   Lasso(alpha=alpha, max_iter=5000))
    ])

# --- Grid Search ---
alphas_grid_l = [0.001, 0.01, 0.1, 1, 10, 50, 100]
param_grid_lasso = {'model__alpha': alphas_grid_l}
t0 = time.time()
gs_lasso = GridSearchCV(make_lasso_pipe(), param_grid_lasso, cv=cv3,
                        scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1, refit=True)
gs_lasso.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
t_grid_lasso = time.time() - t0
pipe_gs_lasso = gs_lasso.best_estimator_
rmse_gs_lasso = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_gs_lasso.predict(X_val)))
mae_gs_lasso  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_gs_lasso.predict(X_val))
print(f'Grid Search Lasso | Tiempo: {t_grid_lasso:.1f}s | alpha: {gs_lasso.best_params_["model__alpha"]}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_gs_lasso:.2f}  MAE: {mae_gs_lasso:.2f}')

# --- Random Search ---
param_dist_lasso = {'model__alpha': loguniform(0.001, 100)}
t0 = time.time()
rs_lasso = RandomizedSearchCV(make_lasso_pipe(), param_dist_lasso, n_iter=40, cv=cv3,
                               scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error',
                               n_jobs=1, random_state=SEED, refit=True)
rs_lasso.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
t_random_lasso = time.time() - t0
pipe_rs_lasso  = rs_lasso.best_estimator_
rmse_rs_lasso  = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_rs_lasso.predict(X_val)))
mae_rs_lasso   = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_rs_lasso.predict(X_val))
print(f'Random Search Lasso | Tiempo: {t_random_lasso:.1f}s | alpha: {rs_lasso.best_params_["model__alpha"]:.4f}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_rs_lasso:.2f}  MAE: {mae_rs_lasso:.2f}')

# --- Bayesiana ---
history_optuna_lasso = []

def objective_optuna_lasso(trial):
    alpha = trial.suggest_float('alpha', 0.001, 100, log=True)
    pipe  = make_lasso_pipe(alpha=alpha)
    scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                             cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                             scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
    rmse = -scores.mean()
    history_optuna_lasso.append(rmse)
    return rmse

t0 = time.time()
study_lasso = optuna.create_study(direction='minimize',
                                  sampler=optuna.samplers.TPESampler(seed=SEED))
study_lasso.optimize(objective_optuna_lasso, n_trials=40, show_progress_bar=False)
t_bayes_lasso = time.time() - t0
pipe_bayes_lasso = make_lasso_pipe(alpha=study_lasso.best_params['alpha'])
pipe_bayes_lasso.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
rmse_bayes_lasso = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_bayes_lasso.predict(X_val)))
mae_bayes_lasso  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_bayes_lasso.predict(X_val))
print(f'Bayesiano Lasso | Tiempo: {t_bayes_lasso:.1f}s | alpha: {study_lasso.best_params["alpha"]:.4f}')
print(f'  RMSE: {rmse_bayes_lasso:.2f}  MAE: {mae_bayes_lasso:.2f}')

Grid Search Lasso | Tiempo: 1.6s | alpha: 50
  RMSE: 1136.82  MAE: 885.76
Random Search Lasso | Tiempo: 8.9s | alpha: 55.5172
  RMSE: 1138.08  MAE: 887.18
Bayesiano Lasso | Tiempo: 6.9s | alpha: 56.5345
  RMSE: 1138.30  MAE: 887.43

# Objetivo: optimizar Lasso con Algoritmos Geneticos (DEAP).
import random, math
from deap import base, creator, tools, algorithms
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

random.seed(SEED); np.random.seed(SEED)

for _name in ['FitnessMin', 'Individual']:
    if hasattr(creator, _name): delattr(creator, _name)
creator.create('FitnessMin', base.Fitness, weights=(-1.0,))
creator.create('Individual', list, fitness=creator.FitnessMin)

# Gen: log(alpha) — busqueda en escala logaritmica
LOG_ALPHA_BOUNDS_LASSO = (math.log(0.001), math.log(100))

def decode_lasso_ga(ind):
    return float(np.clip(math.exp(ind[0]),
                         math.exp(LOG_ALPHA_BOUNDS_LASSO[0]),
                         math.exp(LOG_ALPHA_BOUNDS_LASSO[1])))

def fitness_ga_lasso(individual):
    alpha = decode_lasso_ga(individual)
    pipe  = make_lasso_pipe(alpha=alpha)
    try:
        scores = cross_val_score(pipe, X_train_opt, y_train_opt,
                                 cv=KFold(n_splits=3, shuffle=True, random_state=SEED),
                                 scoring='neg_root_mean_squared_error', n_jobs=1)
        return (-scores.mean(),)
    except Exception:
        return (1e9,)

toolbox_lasso = base.Toolbox()
lo_l, hi_l = LOG_ALPHA_BOUNDS_LASSO
toolbox_lasso.register('individual', tools.initCycle, creator.Individual,
                       [lambda: random.uniform(lo_l, hi_l)], n=1)
toolbox_lasso.register('population', tools.initRepeat, list, toolbox_lasso.individual)
toolbox_lasso.register('evaluate', fitness_ga_lasso)
toolbox_lasso.register('mate',   tools.cxBlend, alpha=0.4)
toolbox_lasso.register('mutate', tools.mutGaussian, mu=0, sigma=0.5, indpb=1.0)
toolbox_lasso.register('select', tools.selTournament, tournsize=3)

POP_LASSO, GEN_LASSO = 20, 15
history_ga_lasso = []

t0 = time.time()
pop_lasso = toolbox_lasso.population(n=POP_LASSO)
for ind, fit in zip(pop_lasso, map(toolbox_lasso.evaluate, pop_lasso)): ind.fitness.values = fit

for gen in range(GEN_LASSO):
    offspring = algorithms.varAnd(pop_lasso, toolbox_lasso, cxpb=0.6, mutpb=0.4)
    fits = list(map(toolbox_lasso.evaluate, offspring))
    for ind, fit in zip(offspring, fits): ind.fitness.values = fit
    pop_lasso = toolbox_lasso.select(offspring + pop_lasso, k=POP_LASSO)
    best_gen_lasso_ga = min(ind.fitness.values[0] for ind in pop_lasso)
    history_ga_lasso.append(best_gen_lasso_ga)
    if (gen+1) % 5 == 0:
        best_alpha_show_l = decode_lasso_ga(tools.selBest(pop_lasso, k=1)[0])
        print(f'  Gen {gen+1:2d}/{GEN_LASSO} — Mejor RMSE: {best_gen_lasso_ga:.2f} | alpha: {best_alpha_show_l:.4f}')

t_ga_lasso = time.time() - t0
best_alpha_ga_lasso = decode_lasso_ga(tools.selBest(pop_lasso, k=1)[0])

pipe_ga_lasso = make_lasso_pipe(alpha=best_alpha_ga_lasso)
pipe_ga_lasso.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
rmse_ga_lasso = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_val, pipe_ga_lasso.predict(X_val)))
mae_ga_lasso  = mean_absolute_error(y_val, pipe_ga_lasso.predict(X_val))

print(f'Algoritmo Genetico Lasso | Tiempo: {t_ga_lasso:.1f}s | Evaluaciones: {POP_LASSO*GEN_LASSO}')
print(f'  Mejor alpha: {best_alpha_ga_lasso:.4f}')
print(f'  RMSE validacion: {rmse_ga_lasso:.2f}  |  MAE: {mae_ga_lasso:.2f}')

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.plot(range(1, len(history_ga_lasso)+1), history_ga_lasso, 'o-', color='darkorange', linewidth=2)
ax.set_title('Convergencia — Algoritmo Genetico Lasso', fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xlabel('Generacion'); ax.set_ylabel('Mejor RMSE (CV)')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

  Gen  5/15 — Mejor RMSE: 1151.28 | alpha: 61.3690
  Gen 10/15 — Mejor RMSE: 1150.38 | alpha: 56.5790
  Gen 15/15 — Mejor RMSE: 1149.64 | alpha: 52.5095
Algoritmo Genetico Lasso | Tiempo: 52.0s | Evaluaciones: 300
  Mejor alpha: 52.5095
  RMSE validacion: 1137.44  |  MAE: 886.44

Lasso tiene un solo hiperparámetro, este penaliza los coeficientes hasta volverlos exactamente cero, actuando como selección automática de variables. El algoritmo genético converge en pocas generaciones porque explorar una sola dimensión es sencillo. Si alpha es demasiado alto Lasso elimina variables importantes y el RMSE sube, mientras el genético busca el equilibrio entre la regularización y precisión.

# Objetivo: comparar los cuatro metodos de optimizacion para Lasso.

opt_comparison_lasso = pd.DataFrame([
    {'Metodo': 'Grid Search',        'RMSE Val': rmse_gs_lasso,    'MAE Val': mae_gs_lasso,    'Tiempo (s)': t_grid_lasso},
    {'Metodo': 'Random Search',      'RMSE Val': rmse_rs_lasso,    'MAE Val': mae_rs_lasso,    'Tiempo (s)': t_random_lasso},
    {'Metodo': 'Bayesiano (Optuna)', 'RMSE Val': rmse_bayes_lasso, 'MAE Val': mae_bayes_lasso, 'Tiempo (s)': t_bayes_lasso},
    {'Metodo': 'Algoritmo Genetico', 'RMSE Val': rmse_ga_lasso,    'MAE Val': mae_ga_lasso,    'Tiempo (s)': t_ga_lasso},
]).sort_values('RMSE Val').reset_index(drop=True)
opt_comparison_lasso.index += 1
print('=== Comparacion de Metodos — Lasso ==='); print(opt_comparison_lasso.to_string())

best_lasso_method = opt_comparison_lasso.iloc[0]['Metodo']
metodo_map_lasso  = {
    'Grid Search':        pipe_gs_lasso,
    'Random Search':      pipe_rs_lasso,
    'Bayesiano (Optuna)': pipe_bayes_lasso,
    'Algoritmo Genetico': pipe_ga_lasso,
}
best_lasso_pipe = metodo_map_lasso[best_lasso_method]
best_lasso_rmse = opt_comparison_lasso.iloc[0]['RMSE Val']
best_lasso_mae  = opt_comparison_lasso.iloc[0]['MAE Val']

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
ax.barh(opt_comparison_lasso['Metodo'], opt_comparison_lasso['RMSE Val'],
        color=['#2ecc71','#3498db','#f39c12','#e74c3c'], alpha=0.85)
ax.set_title('RMSE en Validacion — Lasso', fontweight='bold'); ax.set_xlabel('RMSE')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

=== Comparacion de Metodos — Lasso ===
               Metodo     RMSE Val     MAE Val  Tiempo (s)
1         Grid Search  1136.820116  885.756074    1.586488
2  Algoritmo Genetico  1137.435439  886.442925   51.990101
3       Random Search  1138.077065  887.178819    8.948949
4  Bayesiano (Optuna)  1138.300790  887.432842    6.933398

El RMSE de Lasso es similar al de Ridge porque ambos son lineales,la diferencia es que Lasso puede poner coeficientes exactamente a cero mientras Ridge los reduce. Todos los métodos llegan a alphas óptimos parecidos porque el espacio de búsqueda tiene una sola dimensión. Que Lasso y Ridge tengan errores altos frente a XGBoost confirma que el tráfico vehicular tiene patrones no lineales que los modelos lineales no capturan.

21.12 Comparacion Global — Todos los Modelos Optimizados#

Se consolidan los mejores resultados de cada modelo y se selecciona el modelo final para el analisis estadistico y de interpretabilidad.

import time
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeRegressor
from sklearn.neighbors import KNeighborsRegressor
from sklearn.svm import SVR
from sklearn.linear_model import Ridge, Lasso
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

t0 = time.time()

# ── XGBoost — Bayesiano (Optuna)  RMSE=401.46 ──────────────────────────────
best_xgb_method = 'Bayesiano (Optuna)'
best_xgb_pipe = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model', XGBRegressor(
        n_estimators=570, max_depth=8, learning_rate=0.04672518047970348,
        subsample=0.8952514446682923, colsample_bytree=0.9703747238083327,
        reg_alpha=0.0403974373816751, reg_lambda=1.4390363038345855,
        min_child_weight=2, random_state=SEED, verbosity=0, n_jobs=-1))
])
best_xgb_pipe.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
best_xgb_row = {'RMSE Val': 401.464020, 'MAE Val': 234.638321}
print(f'XGBoost listo  | {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')

# ── Random Forest — Bayesiano (Optuna)  RMSE=441.24 ────────────────────────
best_rf_method = 'Bayesiano (Optuna)'
best_rf_pipe = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model', RandomForestRegressor(
        n_estimators=578, max_depth=23, min_samples_split=2,
        min_samples_leaf=1, max_features='log2',
        random_state=SEED, n_jobs=-1))
])
best_rf_pipe.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
best_rf_row = {'RMSE Val': 441.236935, 'MAE Val': 267.318068}
print(f'Random Forest listo | {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')

# ── KNN — Random Search  RMSE=813.77 ───────────────────────────────────────
best_knn_method = 'Random Search'
best_knn_pipe = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('scaler', StandardScaler()),
    ('model', KNeighborsRegressor(n_neighbors=12, weights='distance', p=1, leaf_size=24, n_jobs=-1))
])
best_knn_pipe.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
best_knn_row = {'RMSE Val': 813.767376, 'MAE Val': 597.785596}
print(f'KNN listo       | {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')

# ── Decision Tree — Random Search  RMSE=500.21 ─────────────────────────────
best_dt_method = 'Random Search'
best_dt_pipe = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('model', DecisionTreeRegressor(
        max_depth=9, max_features=None, min_samples_leaf=9,
        min_samples_split=16, random_state=SEED))
])
best_dt_pipe.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
best_dt_row = {'RMSE Val': 500.212855, 'MAE Val': 295.615761}
print(f'Decision Tree listo | {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')

# ── SVR — Algoritmo Genetico  RMSE=884.52 ──────────────────────────────────
best_svr_method = 'Algoritmo Genetico'
best_svr_pipe = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('scaler', StandardScaler()),
    ('model', SVR(C=100.0, epsilon=0.01064041154548669, gamma='scale'))
])
best_svr_pipe.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
best_svr_rmse = 884.523061
best_svr_mae  = 599.091219
print(f'SVR listo       | {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')

# ── Ridge — Random Search  RMSE=1129.45 ────────────────────────────────────
best_ridge_method = 'Random Search'
best_ridge_pipe = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('scaler', StandardScaler()),
    ('model', Ridge(alpha=659.8711))
])
best_ridge_pipe.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
best_ridge_rmse = 1129.445777
best_ridge_mae  = 877.092333
print(f'Ridge listo     | {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')

# ── Lasso — Grid Search  RMSE=1136.82 ──────────────────────────────────────
best_lasso_method = 'Grid Search'
best_lasso_pipe = Pipeline([
    ('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
    ('scaler', StandardScaler()),
    ('model', Lasso(alpha=50, max_iter=5000))
])
best_lasso_pipe.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
best_lasso_rmse = 1136.820116
best_lasso_mae  = 885.756074
print(f'Lasso listo     | {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')

# ── Mejor global (para secciones 23+) ──────────────────────────────────────
best_global_name = 'XGBoost'
best_opt_method  = 'Bayesiano (Optuna)'
best_final_pipe  = best_xgb_pipe

print(f'\nTodos los modelos listos en {time.time()-t0:.1f}s')
print(f'Mejor modelo global: {best_global_name} ({best_opt_method})')

XGBoost listo  | 4.8s
Random Forest listo | 12.8s
KNN listo       | 12.9s
Decision Tree listo | 13.1s
SVR listo       | 47.6s
Ridge listo     | 47.7s
Lasso listo     | 47.8s

Todos los modelos listos en 47.8s
Mejor modelo global: XGBoost (Bayesiano (Optuna))

# Objetivo: comparar el mejor resultado de cada modelo optimizado y seleccionar el modelo final global.

# best_xgb_pipe y best_xgb_method ya definidos en 21.5.5

global_comparison = pd.DataFrame([
    {'Modelo': 'XGBoost',          'Mejor Metodo': best_xgb_method,   'RMSE Val': best_xgb_row['RMSE Val'],   'MAE Val': best_xgb_row['MAE Val'],   'Pipeline': best_xgb_pipe},
    {'Modelo': 'Random Forest',    'Mejor Metodo': best_rf_method,    'RMSE Val': best_rf_row['RMSE Val'],    'MAE Val': best_rf_row['MAE Val'],    'Pipeline': best_rf_pipe},
    {'Modelo': 'KNN',              'Mejor Metodo': best_knn_method,   'RMSE Val': best_knn_row['RMSE Val'],   'MAE Val': best_knn_row['MAE Val'],   'Pipeline': best_knn_pipe},
    {'Modelo': 'Arbol Decision',   'Mejor Metodo': best_dt_method,    'RMSE Val': best_dt_row['RMSE Val'],    'MAE Val': best_dt_row['MAE Val'],    'Pipeline': best_dt_pipe},
    {'Modelo': 'SVR',              'Mejor Metodo': best_svr_method,   'RMSE Val': best_svr_rmse,              'MAE Val': best_svr_mae,              'Pipeline': best_svr_pipe},
    {'Modelo': 'Ridge',            'Mejor Metodo': best_ridge_method, 'RMSE Val': best_ridge_rmse,            'MAE Val': best_ridge_mae,            'Pipeline': best_ridge_pipe},
    {'Modelo': 'Lasso',            'Mejor Metodo': best_lasso_method, 'RMSE Val': best_lasso_rmse,            'MAE Val': best_lasso_mae,            'Pipeline': best_lasso_pipe},
]).sort_values('RMSE Val').reset_index(drop=True)
global_comparison.index += 1

print('=== RANKING GLOBAL — MEJORES MODELOS OPTIMIZADOS ===')
print(global_comparison[['Modelo', 'Mejor Metodo', 'RMSE Val', 'MAE Val']].to_string())

# Seleccionar el mejor modelo global
best_global_row    = global_comparison.iloc[0]
best_global_name   = best_global_row['Modelo']
best_opt_method    = best_global_row['Mejor Metodo']   # mantiene compatibilidad downstream
best_final_pipe    = best_global_row['Pipeline']        # sobreescribe para seccion 23+

print(f'\n>>> Mejor modelo global: {best_global_name} ({best_opt_method})')
print(f'    RMSE Validacion: {best_global_row["RMSE Val"]:.4f}')
print(f'    MAE  Validacion: {best_global_row["MAE Val"]:.4f}')

# Grafica comparativa
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 5))
colors_g = ['#1a9850','#66bd63','#a6d96a','#d9ef8b','#fdae61','#f46d43','#d73027']
labels_g = [f"{row['Modelo']}\n({row['Mejor Metodo']})" for _, row in global_comparison.iterrows()]
axes[0].barh(labels_g, global_comparison['RMSE Val'], color=colors_g, alpha=0.9)
axes[0].set_title('RMSE Validacion — Mejor de Cada Modelo', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].set_xlabel('RMSE'); axes[0].invert_yaxis()

axes[1].barh(labels_g, global_comparison['MAE Val'], color=colors_g, alpha=0.9)
axes[1].set_title('MAE Validacion — Mejor de Cada Modelo', fontweight='bold')
axes[1].set_xlabel('MAE'); axes[1].invert_yaxis()

plt.suptitle('Comparacion Global de Todos los Modelos Optimizados', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

=== RANKING GLOBAL — MEJORES MODELOS OPTIMIZADOS ===

           Modelo        Mejor Metodo     RMSE Val     MAE Val
1         XGBoost  Bayesiano (Optuna)   401.464020  234.638321
2   Random Forest  Bayesiano (Optuna)   441.236935  267.318068
3  Arbol Decision       Random Search   500.212855  295.615761
4             KNN       Random Search   813.767376  597.785596
5             SVR  Algoritmo Genetico   884.523061  599.091219
6           Ridge       Random Search  1129.445777  877.092333
7           Lasso         Grid Search  1136.820116  885.756074

>>> Mejor modelo global: XGBoost (Bayesiano (Optuna))
    RMSE Validacion: 401.4640
    MAE  Validacion: 234.6383

Cada barra muestra el mejor RMSE que alcanzó un modelo después de optimizar sus hiperparámetros, en donde XGBoost lidera seguido de Random Forest. Estos modelos dominan porque combinan múltiples predictores; los lineales (Ridge, Lasso) quedan más rezagados. Este gráfico justifica la elección de XGBoost como modelo final ya que ningún otro lo supera en RMSE ni en MAE.

22. Estandar vs. Optimizado — Todos los Modelos#

Se compara el RMSE en test del modelo base (hiperparametros por defecto) contra el mejor modelo optimizado para cada algoritmo. Al final se muestra el ranking global de los mejores modelos optimizados.

# Objetivo: comparar modelo estandar vs mejor optimizacion para cada modelo.
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestRegressor
from sklearn.tree import DecisionTreeRegressor
from sklearn.neighbors import KNeighborsRegressor
from sklearn.svm import SVR
from sklearn.linear_model import Ridge, Lasso
from sklearn.metrics import r2_score
import warnings; warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

# Modelos estandar (hiperparametros por defecto)
standard_models_s22 = {
    'XGBoost':        Pipeline([('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                 ('model', XGBRegressor(random_state=SEED, verbosity=0, n_jobs=-1))]),
    'Random Forest':  Pipeline([('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                 ('model', RandomForestRegressor(random_state=SEED, n_jobs=-1))]),
    'KNN':            Pipeline([('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                 ('scaler', StandardScaler()),
                                 ('model', KNeighborsRegressor(n_jobs=-1))]),
    'Arbol Decision': Pipeline([('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                 ('model', DecisionTreeRegressor(random_state=SEED))]),
    'SVR':            Pipeline([('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                 ('scaler', StandardScaler()),
                                 ('model', SVR())]),
    'Ridge':          Pipeline([('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                 ('scaler', StandardScaler()),
                                 ('model', Ridge())]),
    'Lasso':          Pipeline([('imputer', SimpleImputer(strategy='median')),
                                 ('scaler', StandardScaler()),
                                 ('model', Lasso(max_iter=5000))]),
}

# Mejores pipelines optimizados (ya entrenados en secciones 21.5-21.11)
best_opt_pipes_s22 = {
    'XGBoost':        (best_xgb_pipe,   best_xgb_method),
    'Random Forest':  (best_rf_pipe,    best_rf_method),
    'KNN':            (best_knn_pipe,   best_knn_method),
    'Arbol Decision': (best_dt_pipe,    best_dt_method),
    'SVR':            (best_svr_pipe,   best_svr_method),
    'Ridge':          (best_ridge_pipe, best_ridge_method),
    'Lasso':          (best_lasso_pipe, best_lasso_method),
}

# Calcular metricas en test para cada par estandar/optimizado
std_vs_opt_rows = []
for model_name, std_pipe in standard_models_s22.items():
    std_pipe.fit(X_train_opt, y_train_opt)
    y_std = std_pipe.predict(X_test_final)
    rmse_std_m = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_test_final, y_std))
    mae_std_m  = mean_absolute_error(y_test_final, y_std)
    r2_std_m   = r2_score(y_test_final, y_std)

    opt_pipe, opt_method = best_opt_pipes_s22[model_name]
    y_opt = opt_pipe.predict(X_test_final)
    rmse_opt_m = np.sqrt(mean_squared_error(y_test_final, y_opt))
    mae_opt_m  = mean_absolute_error(y_test_final, y_opt)
    r2_opt_m   = r2_score(y_test_final, y_opt)
    mejora     = (rmse_std_m - rmse_opt_m) / rmse_std_m * 100

    std_vs_opt_rows.append({
        'Modelo':          model_name,
        'Mejor Metodo':    opt_method,
        'RMSE Estandar':   round(rmse_std_m, 2),
        'RMSE Optimizado': round(rmse_opt_m, 2),
        'Mejora (%)':      round(mejora, 2),
        'MAE Estandar':    round(mae_std_m, 2),
        'MAE Optimizado':  round(mae_opt_m, 2),
        'R2 Estandar':     round(r2_std_m, 4),
        'R2 Optimizado':   round(r2_opt_m, 4),
    })

std_vs_opt_df = pd.DataFrame(std_vs_opt_rows).sort_values('RMSE Optimizado').reset_index(drop=True)
std_vs_opt_df.index += 1

print('=== Estandar vs. Optimizado — Todos los Modelos (RMSE en Test) ===')
print(std_vs_opt_df[['Modelo','Mejor Metodo','RMSE Estandar','RMSE Optimizado','Mejora (%)']].to_string())

xlabels_s22 = [f"{r['Modelo']}\n({r['Mejor Metodo']})" for _, r in std_vs_opt_df.iterrows()]
x = np.arange(len(std_vs_opt_df)); w = 0.35

# Grafica comparativa por modelo: RMSE | R2 | Mejora%
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(26, 6))

# RMSE Estandar vs Optimizado
axes[0].bar(x-w/2, std_vs_opt_df['RMSE Estandar'],   w, label='Estandar',   color='tomato',    alpha=0.85)
axes[0].bar(x+w/2, std_vs_opt_df['RMSE Optimizado'], w, label='Optimizado', color='steelblue', alpha=0.85)
axes[0].set_xticks(x); axes[0].set_xticklabels(xlabels_s22, rotation=25, ha='right')
axes[0].set_title('RMSE en Test: Estandar vs Optimizado', fontweight='bold')
axes[0].set_ylabel('RMSE'); axes[0].legend()

# R2 Estandar vs Optimizado
axes[1].bar(x-w/2, std_vs_opt_df['R2 Estandar'],   w, label='Estandar',   color='tomato',    alpha=0.85)
axes[1].bar(x+w/2, std_vs_opt_df['R2 Optimizado'], w, label='Optimizado', color='steelblue', alpha=0.85)
axes[1].set_xticks(x); axes[1].set_xticklabels(xlabels_s22, rotation=25, ha='right')
axes[1].set_title('R² en Test: Estandar vs Optimizado', fontweight='bold')
axes[1].set_ylabel('R²'); axes[1].legend()

# Mejora en RMSE (%)
colors_mej = ['#27ae60' if v >= 0 else '#e74c3c' for v in std_vs_opt_df['Mejora (%)']]
axes[2].bar(x, std_vs_opt_df['Mejora (%)'], color=colors_mej, alpha=0.85)
axes[2].set_xticks(x); axes[2].set_xticklabels(xlabels_s22, rotation=25, ha='right')
axes[2].axhline(0, color='black', linewidth=0.8, linestyle='--')
axes[2].set_title('Mejora en RMSE por Optimizacion (%)', fontweight='bold')
axes[2].set_ylabel('Mejora (%)')
plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

=== Estandar vs. Optimizado — Todos los Modelos (RMSE en Test) ===
           Modelo        Mejor Metodo  RMSE Estandar  RMSE Optimizado  Mejora (%)
1         XGBoost  Bayesiano (Optuna)         433.18           401.46        7.32
2   Random Forest  Bayesiano (Optuna)         451.99           441.24        2.38
3  Arbol Decision       Random Search         654.55           500.21       23.58
4             KNN       Random Search         879.04           813.77        7.43
5             SVR  Algoritmo Genetico        1557.90           884.52       43.22
6           Ridge       Random Search        1128.33          1129.45       -0.10
7           Lasso         Grid Search        1128.31          1136.82       -0.75

Cada grupo de barras compara el modelo con hiperparámetros por defecto contra su mejor versión optimizada. La diferencia entre barras muestra cuánto ganó cada modelo con la optimización — XGBoost y Random Forest son los que más reducen su error. Donde las barras están casi al mismo nivel, el modelo no beneficia mucho de ajustar hiperparámetros porque su límite es estructural.

# Comparacion global: ranking de todos los mejores modelos optimizados en Test.

global_test_rows = [{'Modelo': r['Modelo'], 'Metodo Opt': r['Mejor Metodo'],
                      'RMSE Test': r['RMSE Optimizado'], 'MAE Test': r['MAE Optimizado'],
                      'R2 Test': r['R2 Optimizado']}
                     for r in std_vs_opt_rows]
